j[.task: {j[} is the _diamond of selection_ ‚Äî a pair of brackets `[ ]` set to the right of a list, naming by position which items to draw from it. From the woven word `w`, draw the strands at the places `p`, in that order.

d‚ç¥.task: {d‚ç¥} is the _ruby rune of reshaping_, laying the strand on its right into a cloth of the rows and columns named on its left. Weave the thread `t` into a panel of shape `s` ‚Äî so many rows, so many columns.

M¬®.task: {M¬®} is the _sapphire rune of everywhere_ ‚Äî set to the right of a rune, it works that rune upon each item on its right in turn. Drawing on {m‚åΩ}, mirror every strand of the skein `s`, each end for end.

d‚àä.task: {d‚àä} is the _ruby rune of belonging_, marking 1 for each item on its left that is found somewhere on its right, and 0 for each that is not. Which of the dyes `d` are steeped in the vat `v`?

d‚â†.task: {d‚â†} is the _ruby rune of difference_, marking 1 where its left and right disagree and 0 where they match. Where do the warp `a` and the weft `b` cross in different colours?

aM.task:
The looms of Weaver's Hall run every thread in reverse. _Transform_ the skein `s` ‚Äî a bundle of separate threads ‚Äî by mirroring _each_ thread end-for-end. Draw on {m‚åΩ} within {M¬®}.

`{answer}` upon `'MOOD' 'NET' 'POP'` gives `DOOM` `TEN` `POP`.
